sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/About.css'; const About = () => { const teamMembers = [ { name: 'Sarah Johnson', role: 'Conservation Director', image: '/team-1.jpg', bio: 'With over 15 years of experience in wildlife conservation, Sarah leads our strategic initiatives.' }, { name: 'David Mwangi', role: 'Field Operations Manager', image: '/team-2.jpg', bio: 'David coordinates our on-ground conservation efforts and community engagement programs.' }, { name: 'Emma Chen', role: 'Research Coordinator', image: '/team-3.jpg', bio: 'Emma oversees our research programs and partnerships with academic institutions.' } ]; const impactStats = [ { number: '500+', label: 'Wildlife Protected', description: 'Species under our direct conservation programs' }, { number: '1000+', label: 'Community Members', description: 'Local community members trained in conservation' }, { number: '25+', label: 'Conservation Projects', description: 'Active projects across different regions' }, { number: '10,000+', label: 'Hectares Preserved', description: 'Natural habitat protected and restored' } ]; return (

Our Mission for Wildlife

Dedicated to protecting Africa's wildlife through conservation, education, and community engagement

Our Mission

At CareAfrica, we believe in a world where wildlife and humans coexist harmoniously. Our mission is to protect and preserve Africa's diverse wildlife through innovative conservation approaches, community engagement, and sustainable practices.

Protection

Implementing cutting-edge conservation strategies to protect endangered species

Community

Empowering local communities through education and sustainable development

Sustainability

Promoting sustainable practices that benefit both wildlife and human communities

Our Impact

{impactStats.map((stat, index) => (

{stat.number}

{stat.label}

{stat.description}

))}

Our Team

{teamMembers.map((member, index) => (

{member.name}

{member.role}

{member.bio}

))}

Join Our Mission

Together, we can make a difference in protecting Africa's wildlife for future generations.

Make a Donation Volunteer With Us
); }; export default About;
